name: edgar
description: SEC filings in your agent: issuers, Reg CF/D/A raises, XBRL financials, insider trades.
long_description: An MCP server that puts U.S. SEC EDGAR inside your agent. Resolve any company (exchange-listed or private), browse and search filings, screen recent Reg CF / Reg D / Reg A raises and parse their actual deal economics, pull XBRL headline financials, and read insider (Section 16) trades. All tools are read-only over public SEC endpoints — no API key required. The client respects SEC fair-access etiquette (descriptive User-Agent, ~8 req/s throttle, retries) and caches responses in memory only.

user_agent.title: SEC User-Agent (contact info)
user_agent.description: The SEC's fair-access policy asks for a descriptive User-Agent with contact info, e.g. 'your-app you@example.com'. Sent only to the SEC.

tools.name: lookup_issuer
tools.description: Resolve a ticker or company name to a CIK — exchange-listed and private filers.

tools.name: list_filings
tools.description: An issuer's most recent filings, newest first; optional form filter.

tools.name: get_recent_offerings
tools.description: Recent Reg CF / Reg D / Reg A raises, optionally filtered by state.

tools.name: get_filing
tools.description: Open a filing: metadata plus every document with links.

tools.name: get_form_d_details
tools.description: Parse a Reg D raise: amount, sold, investors, industry, people.

tools.name: get_form_c_details
tools.description: Parse a Reg CF raise: target/max, price, terms, two-year financials.

tools.name: get_company_facts
tools.description: XBRL headline financials for public reporting companies.

tools.name: get_filing_text
tools.description: A document's text (HTML stripped), paginated, for reading/summarizing.

tools.name: get_insider_trades
tools.description: Recent Form 4 insider transactions: owner, action, shares, price.

tools.name: get_insiders
tools.description: A company's insiders (officers, directors, >10% owners) and roles.
